basics.name: Ira Zibbu
basics.label: PhD Candidate
basics.summary: Interdiscplinary biologist with interests in Experimental evolution, bacterial genome evolution, next-generation sequencing, bioinformatics & molecular biology.

education.area: Microbiology, Genetics & Immunology | Ecology, Evolution & Behaviour
highlights: Research focus: Incipient speciation & chromosomal rearrangements in E. coli evolution experiments

education.area: Biology with a  minor in Data Science
highlights: Advisors: Jeffrey E. Barrick & Sabari Sankar Thirupathy
Thesis title: Chromosomal Rearrangements Over 75,000 Generations of a Long-Term Evolution Experiment with Escherichia coli
